title: Abdominal Pain
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Abdominal pain has many possible causes and may require medical evaluation when severe, persistent, worsening, or associated with concerning symptoms.
Patient-facing abdominal pain education should emphasize return precautions and follow-up rather than implying a single diagnosis when the ED workup is reassuring.
The source supports general abdominal-pain framing but does not by itself validate a broad nonspecific abdominal-pain ontology phenotype for production use.
